description_text: Este é um  Banco de Talentos,  destinado ao cadastro de  Pessoas com Deficiência para todas as unidades da John Deere no Brasil . Se você é uma pessoa com deficiência, fique à vontade para se candidatar a qualquer outra posição disponível em nosso site. Caso não encontre nenhuma vaga que seja de seu interesse, cadastre-se aqui, e avaliaremos suas informações para futuras oportunidades que possam surgir. Seja você, seja John Deere. Faça parte do nosso time! Áreas para as quais recrutamos no Brasil Administração Geral; Contábil; Controladoria; Engenharia; Financeiro; Jurídico; Logística; Marketing; Operações; Order Fulfillment; Qualidade; Recursos Humanos; Saúde, Segurança e Meio Ambiente; Suporte ao produto; Suprimentos; Tecnologia da informação. Unidades John Deere Brasil: São Paulo Campinas Indaiatuba Goiás Catalão Rio Grande do Sul Horizontina Montenegro Quem não é uma pessoa com deficiência, pode se inscrever? Este banco de talentos é destinado a todas as pessoas com deficiência, caso não faça parte desse grupo, acesse nossas oportunidades na  página de carreiras . (Por favor, anexe o seu laudo) Por que a John Deere está fazendo um banco de talentos para pessoas com deficiências? Reconhecemos e valorizamos a pluralidade dos nossos times. Por isso, criamos condições para a equidade de oportunidades através de políticas, práticas e atitudes que promovam uma cultura de respeito e o desenvolvimento de talentos. O Que Você Receberá Na John Deere, você conseguirá desenvolver uma carreira que levará você aonde quer chegar. Além de produzirmos máquinas conectadas e inteligentes, com a mais alta qualidade, criamos soluções e serviços que garantam que nossos clientes possam gerir seus negócios de forma sustentável e produtiva. Com conexões tecnológicas, sociais e humanas, você terá liberdade de explorar novos projetos e pensar de forma inovadora.

Trabalhamos para que a vida possa avançar e estamos sempre à procura de pessoas inovadoras que possam contribuir com a nossa missão. Que tal fazer parte do nosso time? Local Principal: Brasil (BR) - São Paulo - Indaiatuba Função: Product Engineering (CA) Título: Pessoa Engenheira do Produto PL - Indaiatuba/SP - 118728 Suas Responsabilidades Como Pessoa Engenheira do Produto PL, no Centro de Pesquisa e Desenvolvimento da John Deere em Indaiatuba/SP, você atuará no desenvolvimento e melhoria contínua de componentes e sistemas para pulverizadores e plantadeiras, contribuindo diretamente para a evolução tecnológica das soluções agrícolas da John Deere. Principais Responsabilidades: Projetar novos componentes e sistemas ou aprimorar itens existentes para equipamentos agrícolas; Desenvolver e validar soluções envolvendo estruturas, hidráulica, elétrica e conjuntos mecânicos; Criar e atualizar desenhos técnicos, especificações e documentação de engenharia; Conduzir análises técnicas, revisões de design e investigações de falhas; Suportar todo o ciclo de desenvolvimento do produto, desde conceito até validação e produção; Colaborar com equipes multifuncionais (qualidade, manufatura, supply chain, validação etc.); Acompanhar feedback de campo, analisando causas e implementando melhorias; Garantir que as soluções atendam targets de performance, durabilidade, segurança e custo. Habilidades Que Você Precisa Graduação Completa em Engenharia Mecânica, Elétrica, Mecatrônica ou áreas correlatas; Experiência prévia em desenvolvimento de produtos, projetos mecânicos e de sistemas; Conhecimento e experiência com os softwares CREO e Ansys, ou ferramentas similares; Inglês avançado para comunicação com times globais e documentação técnica; Conhecimento em desenvolvimento de sistemas complexos (hidráulicos, elétricos, estruturais); Capacidade de interpretar requisitos, transformar necessidades em soluções e documentar projetos; Boa comunicação, visão colaborativa e habilidade de atuar em times multidisciplinares. O Que Faz Destacar Experiência com máquinas agrícolas, especialmente pulverizadores ou plantadeiras; Vivência com validação, testes e processos de ciclo de vida de produto; Experiência em suporte à manufatura ou a campo; Conhecimento em DFMEA, PFMEA e metodologias de melhoria contínua; Familiaridade com tecnologias de agricultura de precisão: spot spray, taxa variável, section control, JDLink e telemetria; Disponibilidade para viagens (até 25%). Nossos principais benefícios Remuneração variável; Plano de Saúde; Plano Odontológico; Seguro de Vida; Previdência Privada; Benefício Ótica; Reembolso vacina; Universidade Corporativa; TotalPass; Dependendo da unidade, você terá restaurante no local, vale refeição ou alimentação; Auxílio farmácia; Entre outros LI-Hybrid Nosso Processo Seletivo A seleção começa com a sua inscrição, para algumas vagas, existem alguns testes adicionais. Você terá a possibilidade de conhecer pessoas do time nas entrevistas! Nosso processo seletivo é flexível em termos de tempo, então não se preocupe! Nossa equipe de Talent Acquisition está comprometida em proporcionar a melhor experiência para você. Analisamos todas as candidaturas cuidadosamente e fornecemos feedback em todas as etapas do processo. Além disso, todas as orientações serão enviadas por e-mail! Sobre a John Deere A John Deere é líder global no fornecimento de produtos, tecnologia e serviços avançados para clientes que desempenham um papel essencial na agricultura, construção, florestal entre outros setores. Nosso objetivo é atender à crescente necessidade mundial de alimentos, combustível, abrigo e infraestrutura, enquanto promove a sustentabilidade e a preservação do planeta que chamamos de lar. Inovamos para impulsionar a produtividade e proteger nosso planeta e convidamos você a fazer parte dessa história. Trabalharemos juntos para criar, testar, superar para que para que a vida possa avançar. ??

Develop, code, configure, and test software programs and systems; Evaluate and implement design enhancements to improve the cost-effectiveness, quality, and performance of software applications; Analyze assignments and define technical specifications required to achieve project objectives; Produce and maintain comprehensive documentation as directed or required by the project scope; Collaborate with stakeholders and cross-functional teams to ensure that features align with business requirements; Follow industry-standard Agile methodologies for software design, development, and documentation; Mentor junior software engineers on the team to support professional growth and code quality. Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or equivalent fields; Advanced English (broad vocabulary, strong grammar, able to lead meetings, argue, negotiate, and conduct training sessions); Solid experience in development and implementation using ABAP, SAP Fiori technology, and frameworks; Experience in SAP SD and pricing configurations; Understanding of application development environments, database design, data management, and infrastructure capabilities/constraints; Ability to apply technical information to solve problems and conduct research; Understanding of security vulnerabilities and their remediation; Strong analytical, interpersonal communication, and collaboration skills, with experience in Agile development methodologies; Availability to work in a hybrid model, 3 times a week, in Indaiatuba/SP. Experience working with BADIs and User Exits; Experience providing technical support to end-users.

Trabalhamos para que a vida possa avançar e estamos sempre à procura de pessoas inovadoras que possam contribuir com a nossa missão. Que tal fazer parte do nosso time? Local Principal: Brasil (BR) - São Paulo - Indaiatuba Função: People and Culture (CA) Título: Vaga Afirmativa PCD - Pessoa Analista de Recursos Humanos PL - Indaiatuba/SP - 118287 Como Analista de Recursos Humanos Pleno na John Deere, alocado(a) na unidade de Florestal em Indaiatuba você será responsável pelo processo de onboarding e offboarding, suporte nos processos de recrutamento e seleção, gestão do programa de aprendizes e estagiários, comunicação interna, organização de eventos, gestão de benefícios como fretado, vale alimentação e outros, controle de jornada, NFs e rateios, interface com fornecedores, elaboração de relatórios para suporte à tomada de decisão, treinamentos e atendimento a funcionários contribuindo ativamente e agregando ao setor de Recursos Humanos. Principais Responsabilidades: Onboarding e offboarding Gestão de benefícios locais Desenvolvimento do programa de treinamento Comunicação interna e engajamento Administração de pessoal Habilidades Que Você Precisa: Graduação completa em Recursos Humanos, Administração ou Psicologia Experiência mínima de 2 anos em Recursos Humanos Inglês básico Conhecimento em aministração de pessoal, onboarding e offboarding O Que Faz Destacar: Pós-graduação Inglês avançado Habilidades com power BI Metodologias ágeis Nossos principais benefícios Remuneração variável; Plano de Saúde; Plano Odontológico; Seguro de Vida; Previdência Privada; Benefício Ótica; Reembolso vacina; Universidade Corporativa; TotalPass; Vale refeição ou alimentação; Auxílio farmácia; Entre outros Nosso Processo Seletivo A seleção começa com a sua inscrição, para algumas vagas, existem alguns testes adicionais. Você terá a possibilidade de conhecer pessoas do time nas entrevistas! Nosso processo seletivo é flexível em termos de tempo, então não se preocupe! Nossa equipe de Talent Acquisition está comprometida em proporcionar a melhor experiência para você. Analisamos todas as candidaturas cuidadosamente e fornecemos feedback em todas as etapas do processo. Além disso, todas as orientações serão enviadas por e-mail! Sobre a John Deere A John Deere é líder global no fornecimento de produtos, tecnologia e serviços avançados para clientes que desempenham um papel essencial na agricultura, construção, florestal entre outros setores. Nosso objetivo é atender à crescente necessidade mundial de alimentos, combustível, abrigo e infraestrutura, enquanto promove a sustentabilidade e a preservação do planeta que chamamos de lar. Inovamos para impulsionar a produtividade e proteger nosso planeta e convidamos você a fazer parte dessa história. Build and validate predictive and behavioral models using techniques such as regression, classification, clustering, and time-series forecasting to support strategic decision-making; Design and deploy customer-facing AI solutions using Python, object-oriented programming, cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure), and data processing frameworks like DataBricks, PySpark, SQL; Apply statistical analysis, feature engineering, creating embedding models, and unsupervised learning to identify patterns and trends in structured and unstructured datasets using tools like SQL, Pandas, and Scikit-learn; Support design and management of pilot projects and proofs-of-concept, establishing success metrics and guiding teams through iterative testing and evaluation cycles; Work with engineers, researchers, and product managers to define early-stage use cases, document technical requirements, and prototype solutions using Jupyter notebooks or low-code platform; Oversee data ingestion pipelines, ensure schema consistency, and implement validation checks using ETL tools (e.g., Airflow, dbt) and data quality frameworks; Develop dashboards and reporting mechanisms using tools like Power BI, Tableau, or Looker to track project status and share insights with technical and non-technical audiences; Stay informed on advancements in AI, ML, and data engineering by attending conferences, reading academic papers, and experimenting with new tools and frameworks. Experience technical experience in product, innovation, or program management role; Experience providing technical leadership on a project Experience with data and using data in digital solutions to meaningfully collaborate with technical experts; Demonstrated ability to work with multiple cross-functional initiatives simultaneously; Highly motivated to work in a complex environment and demystifying emerging technology concepts for others. Experience in current and emerging AI practices (especially GenAI); Experience in early-stage product, R&D, innovation, or research organization roles is a plus.

Operate and maintain supplies manufacturing machines and equipment while adhering to all quality and safety standards.Wristband cartridge assembler working on a 4 person production line. Performs packing, wristband, or pre-press functions and operates associated machinery Follows work order instructions and performs labeling requirement Performs quality tests per ISO procedures Complies with all required safety practices and use of PPE Resolves a variety of simple problems of limited complexity by following highly detailed instructions or procedures Receives direct supervision for routine work, new projects or assignments. Very limited requirement for decision making role. Any decisions have limited impact on team effectiveness. Work reviewed for accuracy and overall adequacy Able to work effectively with others and adhere to Zebra Leadership Behaviors. Accepts direction and instructions from supervisor High School or equivalent Ability to follow written and verbal instructions Learns policies and procedures and how to apply them to issues experienced in routine activities

Model Development | Design, develop, and deploy machine learning models, with a particular focus on classification and retrieval tasks. ---|--- Large Language Models | Fine-tune and Distil small language models (SLMs) for specific use cases, utilizing techniques such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), foundation model APIs, and advanced prompt engineering. Audio & Voice Processing | Work on audio and voice manipulation tasks, including text-to-speech (TTS) and speech-to-text (STT). Experimentation & Tracking | Utilize tools such as Hydra for configuration management and Weights & Biases to track and manage experiments. Data Management | Handle and manipulate large datasets to prepare them for machine learning model development and evaluation. Collaboration | Collaborate effectively in a team environment, working on shared codebases and remote projects using Git and GitHub for version control. Deployment | Develop and deploy machine learning models on remote servers. Programming: Strong programming skills, with a high level of proficiency in Python and experience with key data manipulation libraries such as Pandas and NumPy. Machine Learning: A solid background in machine learning, particularly in classification and retrieval tasks. Hands-on experience with large language models (LLMs), including fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and prompt engineering. Collaboration: A proven ability to collaborate effectively in a team environment, particularly when working on shared codebases and remote projects. Version Control: Proficiency in using Git and GitHub for version control. Data Skills: Strong data management and manipulation skills. Remote Development: Experience working on remote servers to develop and deploy machine learning models. Natural Language Processing (NLP): A strong understanding of Natural Language Processing (NLP), with experience in audio/voice manipulation tasks, specifically text-to-speech (TTS) and speech-to-text (STT). ML Libraries: Familiarity with the Hugging Face Transformers and Datasets libraries. Experiment Management: Proficiency in using tools such as Hydra for configuration management and Weights & Biases for tracking experiments.

Performs the physical and/or administrative tasks involved in the shipping, receiving, storing, distributing Certification on powered industrial trucks sit down, dock stocker and powered pallet jacks. Performs quality checks on outbound and inbound shipments. Moves, stacks, and stages product and materials using a forklift or other power equipment. Performs outbound staging and packing in accordance with site policies. Executes ERP system transactions on outbound and inbound shipments. Learns to use handheld RF scanners and Warehouse Management System Maintains inventory accuracy. Handles and controls hazardous material on both inbound and outbound. Complies with 5S safety, housekeeping practices, and regulations Completes all required safety training and follows protocol in all risk situations. Uses Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) appropriate to tasks at hand. Knowledge of safety regulations and procedures related to forklift operation. Capable of standing, sitting, or walking for extended periods. Ability to lift, push, pull, and carry items up to 75 pounds. Certification on powered industrial trucks sit down, stand-up, reach, cherry picker and powered pallet jacks. Proven experience as a forklift operator in a warehouse setting or similar environment High school diploma or GED Proficiency in operating all industrial forklifts within the facility Ability to read and interpret documents such as safety rules, operating and maintenance instructions, and procedure manuals. Knowledge of multiple area of functional responsibility (inbound, outbound forklift roles) Requires full knowledge of own area of functional responsibility Certification in operating various type of forklifts (e.g., sit-down, stand-up, pallet jacks) is a plus. Microsoft Office applications (e.g. outlook, excel) Come join the herd! Work for a company that cares, offers a growth environment, and a culture of respect, inclusion and recognition - our front-line workers have an average 7-year tenure! Healthcare, Dental & Vision, Tuition Reimbursement 401k with Company Match Quarterly Cash Incentive Opportunity 20 Days Starting PTO 2 Floating Holidays and Paid Volunteer Time Off Annual Shoe Allowance and free Company Apparel

As a member of our global supply chain organization, you will experience an environment where our values for innovation, operational excellence, and a commitment to making a positive impact come to life. Our customer first approach and agility enable us to leverage the creativity of the team to adapt swiftly to challenges and create exceptional value for those we serve. Collaboration and teamwork are at the heart of our operations. We drive an operating model and value set where accountability to one another is genuine and executed with consistency, knowing that we succeed as one. Together, we inspire one another, embrace continuous improvement, and make a meaningful impact! El equipo de Planificacion de la Cadena de Suministro es responsable de asegurar los materiales utilizados en las operaciones de Zebra. Los requerimientos de suministro son moderados por el equipo para asegurar que las posiciones de inventario sean apropiadas para satisfacer los requerimientos de la demanda en relacion con los niveles pronosticados, el inventario en orden y en transito desde los centros de distribucion regionales, el ciclo de vida del producto, la calidad y los requerimientos especiales de los clientes y/o proyectos. El equipo coopera con los equipos de Planificadores de Demanda Global, Compradores, Operaciones, Gestion de Pedidos, Logistica, Finanzas, Mesa de Ayuda y Gestion de la Experiencia del Cliente. El Planificador de la Cadena de Suministro II tiene un papel clave en el equipo. Ademas de las responsabilidades estandar de planificacion de materiales, se espera que la persona participe en actividades de mejora continua de los procesos de gestion de materiales y en el trabajo de gestion de proyectos. La Experiencia de la Cadena de Suministro de Zebra: Como miembro de nuestra organizacion global de la cadena de suministro, experimentaras un ambiente donde nuestros valores de innovacion, excelencia operativa y un compromiso de generar un impacto positivo cobran vida. Nuestro enfoque centrado en el cliente y nuestra agilidad nos permiten aprovechar la creatividad del equipo para adaptarnos rapidamente a los desafios y crear un valor excepcional para aquellos a quienes servimos. La colaboracion y el trabajo en equipo son el corazon de nuestras operaciones. Impulsamos un modelo operativo y un conjunto de valores donde la responsabilidad mutua es genuina y se ejecuta con consistencia, sabiendo que tenemos exito como uno solo. ¡Juntos, nos inspiramos mutuamente, abrazamos la mejora continua y generamos un impacto significativo Bachelor's degree required Business, Supply Chain, Finance or related field preferred 2-5 years of experience International Supply Chain experience in service and/or manufacturing a plus Ability to organize and prioritize work Strong analytical and problem-solving skill Strong interpersonal and communication skills Oracle knowledge a plus Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite, particularly Excel Cross-functional Collaboration Problem-solving Communication Skills Stakeholder Management Attention to Detail Time Management Decision-making under pressure Se requiere titulo universitario. Se prefiere en Negocios, Cadena de Suministro, Finanzas o un campo relacionado. 2 a 5 años de experiencia. Se valora la experiencia en Cadena de Suministro internacional en servicios y/o manufactura. Capacidad para organizar y priorizar el trabajo. Solidas habilidades analiticas y de resolucion de problemas. Solidas habilidades interpersonales y de comunicacion. Se valoran los conocimientos de Oracle. Dominio de Microsoft Office Suite, especialmente Excel. Colaboracion Interfuncional Resolucion de Problemas Habilidades de Comunicacion Gestion de Partes Interesadas Atencion al Detalle Gestion del Tiempo Toma de Decisiones bajo Presion Support and actively participate in deployment of supply chain model within region Plan and develop supply schedule to keep sufficient inventory positions to support material requirements of internal or external customers Regularly review and adjust demand plan with internal stakeholders Applies Zebra's procedures to resolve issues and mitigate constraints impacting supply plan including capacity, transportation, and order-management errors Monitor open purchase orders to ensure on time deliveries; partner with Order Management to resolve any admin/order error(s) Escalate shortages within the broader supply chain organization and work to support resolution Develop and maintain strong working relationships and communications with key cross functional stakeholders to confirm production/shipping schedules Perform ad-hoc analysis as needed Participate in cross-functional projects as a representative of the supply chain function Apoyar y participar activamente en el despliegue del modelo de cadena de suministro dentro de la region. Planificar y desarrollar un cronograma de suministro para mantener posiciones de inventario suficientes para respaldar los requerimientos de materiales de clientes internos o externos. Revisar y ajustar regularmente el plan de demanda con las partes interesadas internas. Aplica los procedimientos de Zebra para resolver problemas y mitigar las restricciones que afectan el plan de suministro, incluyendo capacidad, transporte y errores en la gestion de pedidos. Monitorear las ordenes de compra abiertas para asegurar entregas a tiempo; colaborar con el equipo de Gestion de Pedidos para resolver cualquier error administrativo o de pedido. Escalar la escasez de materiales dentro de la organizacion de la cadena de suministro en general y trabajar para apoyar en su resolucion. Desarrollar y mantener relaciones de trabajo solidas y una buena comunicacion con las partes interesadas interfuncionales clave para confirmar los cronogramas de produccion y envio. Realizar analisis ad-hoc segun sea necesario. Participar en proyectos interfuncionales como representante de la funcion de cadena de suministro.

Performs the physical and/or administrative tasks involved in the shipping, receiving, storing, distributing and order fulfillment of merchandise, products, materials, parts, supplies and equipment. Performs quality checks on outbound and inbound shipments. Performs outbound staging and packing in accordance with site policies. Executes ERP system transactions on outbound and inbound shipments. Updates FMS for parcel and freight shipments. Handles and controls hazardous material on both inbound and outbound. Develops familiarity with a subset of products, processes, operational metrics and software tools; learns and follows basic work instructions for functional assignments according to productivity and quality standards Provides input geared towards continuous improvement, work instruction documentation, and standardization of processes. Performs activities to evaluate and maintain equipment. Performs other duties as assigned. High School Diploma or GED preferred but not required. 1 to 2 years of relevant experience is a plus but not required. Effective communication skills. Basic computer literacy, with knowledge of software including Microsoft Office, Warehouse Management Systems, and ERP system. Proficient understanding of the use of a desktop . Basic Math skills. Can read a ruler. Previous Standup forklift operation is a plus but not required. Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Required (safety glasses, steel-toed boots, gloves, etc.) Inventory Control & Cycle Counting RF Scanner & WMS Systems Order Picking, Packing & Shipping Warehouse Safety Compliance Material Handling Equipment Operation Inventory Accuracy & Quality Control Control de Inventario y Conteo Ciclico Escaner de RF y Sistemas WMS Recoleccion, Empaque y Envio de Pedidos Cumplimiento de Seguridad en el Almacen Operacion de Equipo de Manejo de Materiales Precision de Inventario y Control de Calidad

Communication Skills - Clear and effective verbal and written communication Adaptability and Learning Agility - Willingness to learn quickly, curiosity and need to gain new skills, embrace new tools or methods, and thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Technical Skills - Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and basic familiarity with technology solution Integrity - Commitment to ethical behaviour and confidentiality. A proactive problem-solving mindset, creative thinking and a passion for logical puzzles is a plus Basic knowledge of scripting language (for example VBA, Python, JavaScript) or query language (Power Query , SQL) is an advantage Concurrent enrolment in a degree-seeking post-secondary educational institution 0 years

Performs the physical and/or administrative tasks involved in the shipping, receiving, storing, distributing and order fulfillment of merchandise, products, materials, parts, supplies and equipment. Performs quality checks on outbound and inbound shipments. Performs outbound staging and packing in accordance with site policies. Executes ERP system transactions on outbound and inbound shipments. Updates FMS for parcel and freight shipments. Learns to use handheld RF scanners and Warehouse Management System to fulfill orders. Maintains inventory accuracy. Certification on powered industrial trucks including work assist vehicle (WAV), off the ground order picker (up to 35' off the ground), reach truck, dock stocker and powered pallet jacks. Creates repair RMA's, manages receiving and shipment issues within repair systems. Resolves a variety of basic problems of limited complexity under direct supervision and performs rudimentary analysis involving a limited number of factors. Creates expense orders for internal repair consumption. Full knowledge of ISO requirements and demonstrated ability to ensure compliance with external auditors. Personal Protective Equipment (PPE) Required (safety glasses, steel-toed boots, gloves, etc.) Working from heights such as roofs, ladders, or powered lifts. Moving self in different positions to accomplish tasks in various environments including awkward or tight and confined spaces. Remaining in a stationary position, often standing or sitting for prolonged periods. Stooping, kneeling, bending, crouching, reaching, pushing/pulling. Moving about to accomplish tasks or moving from one worksite to another. Adjusting or moving objects up to 75 pounds in all directions. Communicating with others to exchange information. Repeating motions that may include the wrists, hands and/or fingers. Operating motor vehicles, industrial vehicles, or heavy equipment. Assessing the accuracy, neatness and thoroughness of the work assigned. Come join the herd! Performs and understands a variety of tasks associated with servicing customer product. Services customer product, including evaluating and validating customer complaint information, repair history, troubleshooting, and contract entitlement. Creates work instructions, check sheets, or other process documentation. Develops familiarity with a larger subset of products and processes, repair tasks that require specific skills learns and basic product design principles; follows general work instructions for Work for a company that cares, offers a growth environment, and a culture of respect, inclusion and recognition - our front-line workers have an average 7-year tenure! Proactively identifies areas for quality and/or productivity improvement; may work with other departments/colleagues to identify and implement. Possess good knowledge of repair systems; developing the ability to see larger scale trends in terms of product failure modes and repeat repairs. Trains associates in basic work assignments and shares information with the team in regards to new learnings. Complies with all required safety practices, and regulations; participates in safety meetings, committees, and/or audits. Remote Work: Hybrid Overview: At Zebra, we are a community of innovators who come together to create new ways of working. United by curiosity and a culture of caring, we develop smart solutions that anticipate our customer's and partner's needs and solve their challenges. Being a part of Zebra Nation means you are seen, heard, valued, and respected. Drawing from our unique perspectives, we collaborate to deliver on our purpose. Here you are a part of a team pushing boundaries today to redefine the work of tomorrow for organizations, their employees, and those they serve. You'll have opportunities to learn and lead in a forward-thinking environment, defining your path to a fulfilling career while channeling your skills toward causes you care about - locally and globally. Come make an impact every day at Zebra. The Order Experience (OEX) organization is responsible for all aspects of customer care related to the quote-to-order process, including people, process, tools and customer satisfaction. The team is responsible for the accurate entry of purchase order and/or Software information from the sales team or directly from Zebra's customers into Zebra's system. They act as a subject matter expert on all matters related to the product and/or service contract orders, responding to inquiries from management, Zebra's sales teams and the customer. Position: Brno Responsibilities: Learns and applies knowledge of Zebra's systems, processes, and philosophies around management of product and/or service contract orders. Enters new order and/or service contract data into the system, ensuring data accuracy and process adherence. Meets or exceeds all departmental or individual metrics associated with performance against service level agreements Provides price quotes on request. Ensures proper recording and tracking of all assigned orders Responds to customer or internal inquiries regarding order status, invoices, service contract entitlements etc. Escalates any new or complex problems to management for assistance Coordinates with other internal departments to drive issue resolution regarding order status, invoicing, shipping dates, product availability, discounts, quality issues, damaged or mis-shipped product, resolution of other issues etc. Adheres to OEX customer strategy, leads by example and follows our customer principles. Delivers a positive ordering and invoicing experience to our customers and partners. Qualifications: High School or equivalent Strong data entry skills with attention to detail and quality. Strong process adherence. Fluent level of English (written and verbal) as well as local language as applicable. Beginner level skills in Microsoft business applications including Word, Excel and Outlook Customer service values / orientation. Solid professional work behaviors (attendance, teamwork, time management). Strong communication skills (listening, providing clear and concise information, using proper language and communication channels Benefits: 5 weeks of vacation, 5 sick days and 4 volunteer days paid off. Multisport card at a reduced price. Meal contribution. Monthly contribution 1000 CZK/month in the form of credits on your Benefit plus card with cafeteria system where you can choose from wide range of activities/benefits from Health, Sports, Travel, Wellness, Development, Culture up to company Language courses. Training and personal development in soft skills and hard skills, access to our internal learning portal and internal career opportunities within Zebra departments. Annual bonuses based on financial results. Yearly salary increases according to individual performance. Employee referral bonus for bringing New Talent to Zebra. Free beverages and fruit days (coffee, tea, milk available in our kitchenette). Life & Pension insurance contribution. New modern and multifunctional workplace at Vlněna Office park in the city centre Discount at our partners (Banks, HP, Dell, Microsoft Office). You will be an active member of our team, contributing directly to high-priority projects by: Connecting the Dots: Understand and map the critical processes in our company. Supporting High-Impact Audits: Partner with Senior Auditors on SOX compliance, operational audits and testing key financial and operational controls. Contributing to Strategic Risk Program: Contribute to forward-looking initiatives like business continuity planning and Key Risk Indicator (KRI) analysis. Direct Mentorship: Receive dedicated coaching, feedback, and career guidance from an experienced auditor. A Future-Ready Skill Set: Gain hands-on experience in risk management, SOX compliance, process analysis and cross-functional project coordination. Executive Exposure & A Powerful Network: Build relationships with peers and senior leaders and gain direct insight into the issues that matter at executive level. We value curiosity and a fresh perspective over audit or risk experience and are looking for: An Agile & Proactive Self-Starter: You are a proactive problem-solver, take initiative, work independently and aren't afraid to ask questions. A Curious Critical Thinker: You're the person who always asks "why?" and isn't satisfied with surface-level answers. You enjoy identifying patterns and connecting the dots. A Clear Communicator with a Keen Eye for Detail: You believe getting the details right and explaining them clearly are equally important.

Scrum Master is expected to guide and coach teams on the effective use of the Scrum framework. Agile and Scrum Facilitation: Coordinating and facilitating all Scrum events, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, sprint reviews, and retrospectives. Guiding the team to higher levels of Scrum maturity. Assisting with internal and external communication to improve transparency. Team and Product Owner Support: Coaching team members in Agile frameworks and servant leadership. Supporting and educating the Product Owner, especially in managing the product backlog. Working with the Product Owner to handle backlogs and new requests. Project and Process Management: Managing the scope and timeline for each project. Coordinate all project phases: Requirements, Design, Development, Testing, and Hypercare Removing impediments and resolving conflicts that could obstruct the team's progress. Collaborating with the team to schedule work, including addressing defect remediation and refactoring to manage technical debt. Ensuring that deliverables meet quality standards at the end of each sprint. Metrics and Reporting Tracking product metrics Provide regular status updates to stakeholders Communicate the project successes, sprint release notes Bachelor's Degree required or equivalent experience 2-5 years of experience Good Communication Skills Ability to understand end user issues Technical hands-on experience Able to work independently and excel in a collaborative environment Ability to trouble shoot Demonstrated knowledge of applicable IT systems /applications Ability to develop new systems and tools Experience in documenting and maintaining up to date systems procedures Demonstrated analytical skills Experience in performing in a fast-paced, high growth, rapidly changing environment Ability to identify and implement process improvements
